summary: Implemented second visual mode (WaveField) with horizontally-stacked sine waves that respond to bass (amplitude), treble (line width/shimmer), pointer (local warp), and cadence (wave speed). Created ModeManager using composite pattern over GeometrySystem interface — it selects initial mode from seed hash and switches modes at seeded intervals (90-180s). Wired into main.ts replacing direct ParticleField with ModeManager registering both modes. Quality-tier-gated: low=8 waves, medium=14, high=20. All 25 new tests pass, all 394 total tests pass, build succeeds.
